UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF GWYN MIAO AND HONGXIU HE'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE EVIDENTIARY/ISSUE AND MONETARY SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO OBEY COURT ORDER IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. PLAINTIFF MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ISSUE SANCTIONS IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT IS PRECLUDED FROM USING AS EVIDENCE ANY DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, SET ONE. DEFENDANTS SHALL PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SERIES 15.1 AND 50 WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. SANCTIONS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,035 TO BE PAID TO PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE HARRY M DORFMAN, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.
POS OF: NTC OF MTN AND MTN FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO OBEY COURT ORDERS; DEC OF JOANNA KOZUBAL; PROPOSED ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIAO, GWYN LI JUN HE, HONGXIU
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-04-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501,THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS GWYN MIAO AND HONGXIU HE'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS FOR FAILURE TO OBEY COURT ORDERS IS CONTINUED TO MARCH 19, 2014. DEFENDANTS MUST PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORY 15.1, I.E. IDENTIFYING EACH DENIAL AND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE AND THEN PROVIDING RESPONSES FOR SUBSECTIONS (A), (B) AND (C) AS TO EACH DENIAL AND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE. RESPONSES MUST BE HAND-DELIVERED TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AND COURTESY COPIES MUST BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN MARCH 11, 2014. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A REPLY NO LATER THAN MARCH 14, 2014. MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,095. IF COMPLETE RESPONSES ARE NOT TIMELY PROVIDED MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS WILL BE GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CLERK B. PAREDES, NOT REPORTED. (501)

Joanna Kozubal, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs GWYN LI JUN MIAO and HOUNGXIU HE.

Plaintiffs Gwyn Li Jun Miao and Houngxiu He sworn and examinded on their own behalf.

The court entered Judgment as read on the record. See Scanned Judgment.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Orders
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on Wednesday, March 19, 2014. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS GWYN MIAO'S and HONGXIU HE'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Orders is GRANTED. Defendants answer is hereby stricken. Plaintiffs may seek entry of default. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (D501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Orders
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Continued To Mar-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joanna Kozubal, Esq. attorney at law (415-864-6962) for Gwyn Li Jun Miao, Plaintiff and moving party.
No appearance by Defendant and opposing party.

The Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFs GWYN MIAO and HONGXIU HE's Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Orders is Continued to March 19, 2014. Defendants must provide complete responses to form interrogatory 15.1, i.e. identifying each denial and affirmative defense and then providing responses for subsections (a), (b) and (c) as to each denial and affirmative defense. Responses must be hand-delivered to Plaintiff's counsel and courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than March 11, 2014. Plaintiff may file a reply no later than March 14, 2014. Monetary sanctions are granted in the amount of $2,095. If complete responses are not timely provided motion for terminating sanctions will be granted. Order signed in open court. Judge A. James Robertson II, Clerk B. Paredes, Not Reported. (501)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Orders
Off Calendar Feb-05-2014 Continued To Mar-04-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF GWYN MIAO and HONGXIU HE's Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Orders is continued to March 4, 2014. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition no later than February 14, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative Evidentiary/Issue And Monetary Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Order
Off Calendar Dec-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Joanna Kozubal (415)864-6962 for PLAINTIFF GWYN MIAO and HONGXIU HE the moving party/ No appearance by the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF GWYN MIAO and HONGXIU HE's Motion For Terminating Sanctions Or In The Alternative Evidentiary/Issue And Monetary Sanctions For Failure To Obey Court Order is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff motion for terminating sanctions is DENIED. Plaintiff's motion for issue sanctions is granted as follows: Defendant is precluded from using as evidence any documents responsive to Request for Production, Set One. Defendants shall provide complete responses without objections to Form Interrogatories series 15.1 and 50 within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,035 to be paid to Plaintiffs' counsel within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Harry M Dorfman, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)
